instruction:
You are a Common Lisp macro expert. Given this code pattern:
(ok t)

Write a macro that addresses: Macro call that should be transformed by ok
reference_defmacro:
(defmacro ok (test &optional desc)
  (with-gensyms (duration result)
    (once-only (test desc)
      `(with-catching-errors (:expected T :description ,desc)
         (with-duration ((,duration ,result) ,test)
           (test ,result t ,desc
                 :duration ,duration
                 :test-fn (lambda (x y)
                            (eq (not (null x)) y))
                 :got-form ,test))))))
